consolidation_targets.timeAgo: Duplicated in Chat.jsx, ChatMessage.jsx, Comms.jsx, FeedDetailPanel.jsx, FeedItem.jsx, Routines.jsx, Vault.jsx, Workspaces.jsx — extract to src/lib/formatters.js
consolidation_targets.prettyName: Duplicated in Vault.jsx and Comms.jsx — extract to src/lib/formatters.js
consolidation_targets.stripChatDecorations: Duplicated in FeedDetailPanel.jsx and WallpaperPanel.jsx — extract to src/lib/formatters.js or chatUtils.js
